theme_and_archetype.domain: Audio Software / VST Plugin / Developer API
theme_and_archetype.reasoning: A VST plugin purchasing and API management system needs to evoke trust, technical precision, and high-fidelity audio engineering. Dark mode reduces eye strain for long studio sessions, and the Swiss brutalist approach ensures clarity in data-heavy views (license management, API docs).

headings.usage: Landing page hero, section headers, prominent feature callouts. Use bold, high-impact weights.

body.usage: General body text, documentation paragraphs, dashboard descriptions.

monospace.usage: API endpoints, code snippets, license keys, numerical data, data-grid headers.

rules.gradients: Banned for background. Use solid colors or very subtle, grainy textures.
rules.contrast: Ensure all text meets 4.5:1 WCAG AA. License keys must use highest contrast (#FFFFFF on #0A0A0A).
rules.tinting: Greys should have a very slight cool (blue/purple) undertone to feel native to audio tools, avoiding muddy browns.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing (p-8 to p-12) for Landing Page sections. Dense, functional spacing (p-4 to p-6) for Dashboard/Admin panels.

grid_system.landing: Bento Grid Mode A (Tetris Grid). Use asymmetry. Hero spans full width, features break into 8/4 or 6/6 spans.
grid_system.dashboard: Control Room Grid Mode B. Dense grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. 100% utilization of vertical space with h-full.

surfaces.dashboard_cards: Flat background (#141414), 1px solid border (#2A2A2A). NO shadow. Sharp edges (rounded-none or max rounded-sm).
surfaces.api_docs: Grid Borders ('Technical' Look). Expose the skeleton. border-collapse style layout for endpoint lists.
surfaces.navbar: Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 with 1px border-b border-white/10.

shadcn_customization.shadows: Remove all generic drop shadows. Rely on 1px solid borders for separation.
shadcn_customization.buttons: Flat, sharp edges. Primary button is #FF3333. Hover state must explicitly define text color.
shadcn_customization.inputs: Background #0A0A0A, border #2A2A2A, text #FFFFFF. On focus: border-color #FF3333 ring-0.
shadcn_customization.tables: Dense padding (py-2 px-3), border-b border-[#2A2A2A]. Header text: JetBrains Mono, text-xs, text-[#A0A0A0], uppercase.

components_rules.forms: Use Shadcn Form + Zod. All sensitive endpoints must map visual validation states clearly.
components_rules.testing: CRITICAL: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. Example: data-testid='checkout-buy-button', data-testid='license-copy-btn'.

hero_background.description: Abstract wavy pattern on black, representing sound waves. Use with a heavy black overlay (bg-black/60) to ensure text legibility.

product_feature.description: Close-up of a digital audio interface displaying a vibrant sound wave and control elements.
product_feature.location: Feature section, showcasing the VST's high-fidelity audio processing.

studio_context.location: Testimonial or 'Used By Professionals' section background.

icons.style: Regular or Light weight. Duotone only for prominent features.

interactions.hover_states: All buttons must darken (e.g., #FF3333 -> #E62E2E) or lighten slightly on hover. Text color MUST be explicitly set.
interactions.license_keys: Click-to-copy interaction required. Provide instant visual feedback (Toast notification using Sonner + inline checkmark icon swap).
interactions.page_transitions: Instant and functional. Minimal animation on the dashboard. Use Framer Motion for landing page scroll reveals (fade up, y: 20 -> 0).
interactions.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. High contrast focus rings (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#FF3333] focus:outline-none) on all inputs.

instructions_to_main_agent.stack: FastAPI (Python) backend, React + Vite frontend, TailwindCSS, Shadcn UI.

architecture_requirements.backend: Implement REST API for product metadata, auth, checkout session creation, webhook listening, and license generation. Use SQLAlchemy. Protect sensitive endpoints.
architecture_requirements.stripe: Implement Stripe Checkout and Webhooks. Ensure no raw card data hits the backend. Create Payment Intents or Checkout Sessions.
architecture_requirements.frontend_routing: Implement separate layouts: '/' for Landing Page, '/checkout' for purchase flow, '/dashboard' for customer portal/license management, and '/api-docs' for documentation.
architecture_requirements.security: Implement JWT or secure session-based authentication for the dashboard. Enforce rate limits.
architecture_requirements.database: Define schema for Users, Orders, Licenses, Transactions. Relate Licenses to Users via Order ID.

instructions_to_main_agent.execution_order: 1. Setup backend models and database. 2. Implement Stripe Checkout and Webhooks. 3. Build frontend Landing Page. 4. Build frontend Dashboard (License Auth/View). 5. Connect Frontend and Backend APIs.
instructions_to_main_agent.dev_tools: Include standard .env templates, Dockerfile (optional), and setup scripts for local testing.
